translation_notes: Advance Block pattern identified by: (1) progressive shortening of candlestick bodies compared to previous bar, (2) lengthening upper wicks indicating rejection at highs, (3) exit when price closes above 20-period SMA signaling failed reversal. Pattern requires 3-candle sequence but backtest engine will evaluate bar-by-bar. Overall rank 54 indicates mediocre performance; pattern performs better on downward breakouts per source material.
